info.title: Imagesystems
info.description: Imagesystems — hotel & real estate image enhancement, generation, and batch pipelines

post.description: Issue a dev JWT when LOCAL_DEV_MODE=true (no Supabase). Validates optional env gate.

get.description: Get current user profile. Auth is handled by Supabase on the frontend.

schema.title: Response List Keys Api Keys Get

post.description: Test if an API key works against the provider (does not persist).
Test the stored (encrypted) key and update is_valid on the row.

schema.title: Response Upload Images Api Images Upload Post

post.description: Persist a browser-processed result (Improve engine) as a new final version — no external API keys.

parameters.name: version

schema.description: Version ID to download. If empty, downloads original.
schema.title: Version

parameters.description: Version ID to download. If empty, downloads original.

post.description: Vision model suggests a short kebab-case filename stem (requires OpenAI or Gemini API key).

schema.title: Response List Images Api Images Get
Response List Jobs Api Jobs Get

get.description: Get processing history for the current user.

schema.title: Response Get History Api History Get

get.description: Get usage summary and daily stats.

post.description:
Check whether a URL can be displayed in an iframe from this app (X-Frame-Options / CSP). Many sites
(e.g. Expedia) forbid embedding — the panel would stay blank without this check.

Fetch a page once (Zyte or direct HTTP) and list image URLs from that HTML.
No additional Zyte calls for /scrape/import-urls — only this endpoint runs browser extract.

Download image URLs (each re-validated for SSRF) and register as Image rows — same as multipart upload.
Does not call Zyte; only HTTP GETs the selected asset URLs (your CDN / origin bandwidth).

schema.title: Response Import Urls As Images Api Scrape Import Urls Post

post.description:
Phase 1a — Software intelligence: turn a vague request into a concrete image prompt.
Does not call the image API or consume image-generation quota.
Interpret (optional) → image model → persist as a new Image (original), same as an upload for Operations.

get.description: Facet values present in the catalog plus the full risk-category and rule registries.

parameters.name: category

schema.description: Derived risk bucket (keyword match). See /scenarios/filters → risk_categories.
schema.title: Category

parameters.description: Derived risk bucket (keyword match). See /scenarios/filters → risk_categories.

parameters.name: rule_ref

schema.description: Scenario must reference this policy id.
schema.title: Rule Ref

parameters.description: Scenario must reference this policy id.

parameters.name: id_prefix

schema.description: Scenario id starts with this prefix.
schema.title: Id Prefix

parameters.description: Scenario id starts with this prefix.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Case-insensitive substring over narrative + id + vertical.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring over narrative + id + vertical.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Max items to return after offset.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Max items to return after offset.

get.description: Readiness: verifies database connectivity (for load balancers / k8s).

skip_connection_test.title: Skip Connection Test
skip_connection_test.description: If True, store without contacting provider; is_valid stays False.

ApiKeyValidateSavedRequest.title: ApiKeyValidateSavedRequest
ApiKeyValidateSavedRequest.description: Validate the key already stored for this provider (server decrypts).

auto_rotation_rad.title: Auto Rotation Rad
auto_rotation_rad.description: Roll in radians from browser Sobel estimator; used with auto perspective + cloud plate.

improve_input_version_id.title: Improve Input Version Id
improve_input_version_id.description: Required when provider is openai or gemini: ImageVersion id from POST .../local-improve (browser Improve output). Cloud models always enhance this raster, never the raw upload.

depth_score.title: Depth Score
depth_score.description: Heuristic richness score for the scenario narrative.

rule_summaries.title: Rule Summaries
rule_summaries.description: rule_ref id → short policy line from the server registry.

EnhancementScenarioItem.title: EnhancementScenarioItem
EnhancementScenarioItem.description: One catalog row plus derived intelligence for clients.

auto_rotation_rad.title: Auto Rotation Rad
auto_rotation_rad.description: Roll in radians for auto perspective when using cloud enhance.

improve_input_version_id.title: Improve Input Version Id
improve_input_version_id.description: Required for OpenAI/Gemini full pipeline: id of an ImageVersion with provider=improve (browser Improve output). Cloud models enhance this raster, not the raw upload.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Which provider's key to use for the interpretation LLM (match the key you use to generate).

ImageGenerationComposeRequest.title: ImageGenerationComposeRequest
ImageGenerationComposeRequest.description: Turn natural language into a concrete image prompt (preview before generation).

interpreted_prompt.title: Interpreted Prompt
interpreted_prompt.description: Refined prompt ready for the image model.

short_title.title: Short Title
short_title.description: Short label for filenames and UI.

interpret.title: Interpret
interpret.description: When True, run an LLM step to expand the description into a detailed image prompt.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Image quality: low | medium | high — passed to OpenAI; same tier is applied to Gemini (prompt + encoder settings) for matching behavior.

output_format.title: Output Format
output_format.description: png, jpeg, or webp — OpenAI returns that format natively; Gemini output is re-encoded to the same format and file extension.

run_enhancement_pipeline.title: Run Enhancement Pipeline
run_enhancement_pipeline.description: Phase 2: run full enhancement after generation — not implemented yet.

ImageGenerationGenerateRequest.title: ImageGenerationGenerateRequest
ImageGenerationGenerateRequest.description: Generate a new raster from text; optionally interpret vague text first.

resolved_prompt.title: Resolved Prompt
resolved_prompt.description: Exact prompt sent to the image API.

used_interpretation.title: Used Interpretation
used_interpretation.description: Whether the LLM interpretation step ran.

ImageGenerationGenerateResponse.title: ImageGenerationGenerateResponse
ImageGenerationGenerateResponse.description: New Image row plus generation metadata.

ImportUrlImageHint.title: ImportUrlImageHint
ImportUrlImageHint.description: Per-URL context from the scrape UI (same order as urls). Helps Groq match Gemini-style names.

use_groq_naming.title: Use Groq Naming
use_groq_naming.description: When True and user has a saved Groq key, rename each import using Groq (text-only; rules align with export AI naming).

page_url.title: Page Url
page_url.description: Final page URL after redirects — context for listing-style names.

image_hints.title: Image Hints
image_hints.description: Optional list parallel to urls (alt, source). Must match len(urls) when set.

LocalDevLoginBody.title: LocalDevLoginBody
LocalDevLoginBody.description: Credentials for LOCAL_DEV_MODE JWT (never used in production Supabase flow).

ScenarioFiltersResponse.title: ScenarioFiltersResponse
ScenarioFiltersResponse.description: Dropdown / facet values for QA UIs.

total.title: Total
total.description: Scenarios in the full catalog before filters.

filtered.title: Filtered
filtered.description: Count after filters, before limit/offset slice.

use_rendered_scrape.title: Use Rendered Scrape
use_rendered_scrape.description: When True: Zyte API (browser HTML) when a key is available, else direct HTTP. (use_firecrawl is a legacy JSON alias for this flag.)

scrape_image_cap.title: Scrape Image Cap
scrape_image_cap.description: Maximum image URLs the server will return for one scan (list may be truncated).

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: 'openai' or 'gemini' — must match a saved API key. Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite is default for low-cost naming.

SuggestFilenameRequest.title: SuggestFilenameRequest
SuggestFilenameRequest.description: Which image bytes to analyze (original vs a version).
